// Imports var ___HTML_LOADER_IMPORT_0___ = new URL("./taskpane.css", import.meta.url); var ___HTML_LOADER_IMPORT_1___ = new URL("../../assets/logo-filled.png", import.meta.url); // Module var code = "\n\n\n\n\n\n\n \n \n \n Sectors Task Pane Add-in\n\n \n <" + "script type=\"text/javascript\" src=\"https://appsforoffice.microsoft.com/lib/1/hosted/office.js\"><" + "/script>\n\n \n \n\n \n \n\n\n\n

\n
